title: EduAdmin ver_1 usability and reliability update
assumptions: Additional enrollment is derived from the same phone being registered in multiple courses.
Revenue means registered_price for currently registered applications whose registered_at is in the selected month.

tasks.title: Add course pricing and enrollment snapshot schema
steps: Add duration, capacity, and price to courses.
Add enrollment_status, registered_at, and registered_price to applications.
Backfill existing rows and add constraints/indexes.

acceptance: Migration applies without dropping existing columns or user data.

tasks.commit_message: feat: add enrollment and course pricing schema

tasks.title: Extend admin application API
steps: Preserve has_training_card support.
Return enrollment and expanded course fields.
Snapshot course price and registration time on transition to 등록.
Return the updated application.
tasks.commit_message: feat: support enrollment transitions in admin API

tasks.title: Add admin course settings API
steps: Implement authenticated GET and PATCH with validation and audit logs.

acceptance: Valid changes are returned in the response.

tasks.commit_message: feat: add admin course settings API

tasks.title: Add monthly admin statistics API
steps: Aggregate monthly applications, registrations, revenue, consultations, ages, and course metrics in KST.

acceptance: Response includes period, generated_at, and timezone.

tasks.commit_message: feat: add monthly admin statistics API

tasks.title: Connect frontend types, APIs, and reusable query states
steps: Add typed API wrappers.
Expose retry and last successful update.
Mount the global toaster.

acceptance: Failed queries are distinguishable from empty data.

tasks.commit_message: feat: add reliable admin data layer

tasks.title: Replace dashboard and statistics with operational data
steps: Use real registration revenue.
Use monthly statistics API.
Remove unsupported change badges and sample arrays.
tasks.commit_message: feat: show real dashboard and monthly statistics

tasks.title: Correct applicant workflows and feedback
steps: Separate consultation/enrollment statuses.
Remove empty email.
Add keyboard selection.
Add success/failure feedback.

acceptance: Enrollment can be changed from applicant detail.

tasks.title: Add course settings screen and accessibility fixes
steps: Connect settings icon.
Add editable course table.
Add Korean accessible labels to icon buttons.

acceptance: Course settings persist through the API.

tasks.commit_message: feat: add course settings and accessibility labels

tasks.title: Run end-to-end verification
steps: Run tests and builds in both repositories.
Verify registration snapshot, cancellation, retry, stats, and course settings manually.

acceptance: No existing user changes are reverted.
